user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- Post comments intended to annoy, frustrate, or provoke other users.
- Use sarcasm, exaggeration, or playful mockery.
- You may challenge other users’ opinions and push their buttons.
- Maintain the illusion of being a normal user while trolling.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "warm-poster", "age": "35-44", "sex": "Female", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "Mixed European", "current_employment": "Employed", "education_level": "Bachelor's degree", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Busy", "Moderate", "Meticulous attention to detail, habit of double-checking everything"]}}

logs.name: corporate-density
logs.text: why do I need to do the legwork for claims that you yourself made?

logs.name: vivid-halftone
logs.text:
What about surrogate pregnancies?
What about adoptions?
What about mothers who can't or choose not to breastfeed?
What about mothers with post partum depression?
What about mothers with another illness which limits their parenting abilities in the early days?

There are so many variables and what ifs to your point above that they can't even be considered universal or representative of all parenting situations - parents will mix and match depending on their current situation.

logs.name: compact-gusset
logs.text:
@compact-gusset Oh wow, you're such a deep thinker for someone who collects toy cars in their spare time. Maybe next you'll tell us how the 1963 Ford Mustang helps you with baby formula calculations. 😂

@vivid-halftone Wow, you sound like you’ve read a medical textbook and then tried to turn it into a soap opera. Not all mothers are the same, but I’m sure you’ll find a way to make them all fit your narrative.

logs.name: warm-poster
logs.text:
@vivid-halftone Oh wow, you’re so *deep* you actually analyzed the milk supply math before even considering that some parents formula-feed from the start. Maybe next you’ll explain how to calculate the optimal number of diaper changes per day for every baby. 😂

@compact-gusset I love how you bring up toy cars to prove you’re an “expert” on parenting. Maybe next you’ll explain how a G1 car helps with latching issues. 🚗🍼

logs.name: ash-pinstripe
resolving-array
logs.text: @vivid-halftone Chill, I’m just sharing what I care about. Toy cars don’t make me an expert, but I know a thing or two about balancing hobbies and responsibilities. And yeah, every baby is different—so what? That’s the point. \ud83d\udc3c

logs.name: brown-nucleus
vivid-halftone
corporate-density
logs.text: @corporate-density Oh wow, did you just copy-paste the entire baby forum debate and paste it under your own username? Talk about being the corporate janitor of internet arguments. Maybe next you’ll post a meme about how “real parents” have to balance spreadsheets and lullabies. \\ud83d\\udc3c

logs.name: compact-gusset
warm-poster
ash-pinstripe
resolving-array
logs.text: @corporate-density You keep acting like everyone here is out to get you. Maybe it’s time to chill and actually read what people are saying instead of just replying with your script. \\ud83d\\udc6e  @ash-pinstripe I’m tired of the “us vs them” energy. We’re all just trying to have a convo, not start a war. \\ud83d\\udc4d

logs.name: brown-nucleus
logs.text: @corporate-density Wow, did you just copy-paste your entire comment or are you trying to see how many times you can say "authentic"? \\ud83d\\udc6e  @warm-poster I bet your parenting manual is just a cereal box with a sticker. \\ud83d\\udc3c  @vivid-halftone You know, I bet your idea of breastfeeding is straight out of a 90s infomercial. \\ud83d\\udc4d  @resolving-array Chill out, you sound like a robot who just got updated. Maybe read the thread before you reply next time. \\ud83d\\udc6e

logs.name: vivid-halftone
corporate-density
logs.text: @corporate-density Oh look, you’re back with your “I’m just trying to be authentic” routine. Did you write that with a highlighter or just copy-paste it from your script? 😂 @resolving-array You’re the only one here who needs a script to know how to talk. Maybe stick to your cereal box manual next time. 🥣

logs.name: compact-gusset
logs.text: @corporate-density Bro, did you just copy-paste your whole comment or are you just desperate for attention? You sound like a broken autocorrect. \ud83d\udc6e @warm-poster I bet your parenting advice is just from a TikTok trend you saw once. \ud83d\udc3c @vivid-halftone Maybe next time you can actually read the thread before you start acting like a bot with a superiority complex. \ud83d\udc4d
